# yii3-turnstile

Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA widget and validator for Yii3.

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-turnstile
```

## Rules

- `declare(strict_types=1)` in every file.
- `final readonly class` by default. `final class` only when clone-based immutability is needed.
- `#[\Override]` on every interface/parent method implementation.
- No `@psalm-suppress` — fix the root cause.
- Secret key must never appear in client-side output.

## API reference

### Turnstile (widget)

Renders Cloudflare Turnstile HTML. Extends `Yiisoft\Widget\Widget`.

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Turnstile\Turnstile;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Turnstile\TurnstileTheme;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Turnstile\TurnstileSize;

$html = Turnstile::widget()
    ->withSiteKey('site-key')
    ->withTheme(TurnstileTheme::Light)
    ->withSize(TurnstileSize::Compact)
    ->withResponseFieldName('cf-turnstile-response')
    ->withJsApiUrl('https://challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v0/api.js')
    ->render();
```

Fluent setters (`with*`) return a new cloned instance. `render()` throws
`RuntimeException` if `siteKey` was not set.

Output:

```html
<script src="https://challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v0/api.js" async defer></script>
<div class="cf-turnstile" data-sitekey="site-key" data-response-field-name="cf-turnstile-response" data-theme="light" data-size="compact"></div>
```

### TurnstileConfig

Immutable configuration DTO.

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Turnstile\TurnstileConfig;

$config = new TurnstileConfig(
    siteKey: 'site-key',
    secret: 'secret-key',
    verifyUrl: 'https://challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v0/siteverify',
    sendRemoteIp: false,
);
```

### TurnstileClient

Verifies tokens via Cloudflare's siteverify API. Requires PSR-18 + PSR-17.

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Turnstile\TurnstileClient;
use Nyholm\Psr7\Factory\Psr17Factory;
use GuzzleHttp\Client;

$client = new TurnstileClient(
    config: $config,
    httpClient: new Client(),
    requestFactory: new Psr17Factory(),
    streamFactory: new Psr17Factory(),
);

$result = $client->verify(token: 'turnstile-token', clientIp: '1.2.3.4', idempotencyKey: 'uuid-v4');
// $client->verifyWithSecret(token: '...', secret: 'override', clientIp: null, idempotencyKey: null);
```

`clientIp` is only sent when `$config->sendRemoteIp === true`. `idempotencyKey`
(optional UUID) is sent only when provided and lets you re-verify the same token
idempotently. `verifyWithSecret()` overrides the config secret (used by the rule
handler when a per-rule `secret` is set).

In the validator pipeline the handler resolves `clientIp` from the current
request via `yiisoft/request-provider` (`RequestProviderInterface`, `REMOTE_ADDR`),
not from validation-context parameters.

### VerificationResult

```php
final readonly class VerificationResult
{
    public bool $success;
    public array $errorCodes;      // string[]
    public ?string $hostname;
    public ?string $action;
    public ?string $challengeTs;
}
```

### TurnstileRule / TurnstileRuleHandler

Yii validator rule. Handler gets `TurnstileClient` via DI.

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Turnstile\TurnstileRule;

class LoginForm
{
    #[TurnstileRule(
        message: 'Captcha verification failed',
        sendRemoteIp: true,
    )]
    public string $captcha = '';
}
```

Constructor parameters:

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `message` | `string` | `'The CAPTCHA verification failed.'` | Error message. |
| `secret` | `?string` | `null` | Override secret (uses DI config if null). |
| `sendRemoteIp` | `bool` | `false` | Forward client IP to Cloudflare. |
| `skipOnEmpty` | `bool\|callable\|null` | `null` | Skip validation on empty value. |
| `skipOnError` | `bool` | `false` | Skip if a previous rule already failed. |
| `when` | `?Closure` | `null` | Conditional execution. |

### Enums

```php
enum TurnstileTheme: string  { case Auto = 'auto'; case Light = 'light'; case Dark = 'dark'; }
enum TurnstileSize: string   { case Normal = 'normal'; case Compact = 'compact'; case Flexible = 'flexible'; case Invisible = 'invisible'; }
```

### DI config (yiisoft/config)

```php
// config/params.php
return [
    'rasuvaeff/yii3-turnstile' => [
        'siteKey' => $_ENV['TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY'],
        'secret' => $_ENV['TURNSTILE_SECRET'],
        'verifyUrl' => 'https://challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v0/siteverify',
        'sendRemoteIp' => false,
    ],
];

// config/di.php — auto-wired by yiisoft/config
// Registers TurnstileConfig and TurnstileRuleHandler in the container.
```
